name: Lypsa Gems & Jewellery Limited
summary: Lypsa Gems & Jewellery Limited engages in the diamonds business primarily in India. It makes, polishes, trades, imports, and exports diamonds, gems, and other precious stones. The company exports its products to the United States, Belgium, Israel, the United Arab Emirates, and Hong Kong. It serves small and mid-level diamond manufacturers. The company was formerly known as Maloo Gems & Jewellery Limited and changed its name to Lypsa Gems & Jewellery Limited in August 2011. Lypsa Gems & Jewellery Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Mumbai, India.
